title: Golden Syrian Fish Kibbeh
description: Delicate Syrian fish kibbeh baked to a crunchy golden perfection, featuring caramelized red onions.

ingredients.name: Red Onions (1 large)
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice and separate into rings

ingredients.name: Olive Oil (2 tablespoons)
ingredients.notes: For brushing fish and bulgur mixture

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Rinse the fish fillet, pat dry with paper towels, and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together bulgur, red onions, garlic, olive oil, salt, black pepper, cumin, and paprika.
Add the lemon juice to the bulgur mixture and stir to combine.
Place the fish fillet on the prepared baking sheet and brush with olive oil.
Spoon the bulgur mixture evenly over the fish, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the kibbeh is golden brown.
Remove the kibbeh from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
